top_visual_formats: Cinematic narrative-driven music videos with high production and storytelling
Animated visualizers with kinetic typography and abstract backgrounds
Lifestyle vlog content (house tours, personal behind-the-scenes moments)
dominant_emotion: Confident vulnerability—emotional authenticity combined with swagger, 'I feel this deeply AND I own it'
oversaturated: Celebrity lifestyle content paired with high-budget music videos emphasizing personality and narrative drama
hook_pattern_of_day: Conversational, confessional openings that blend personal vulnerability with self-assured attitude
contrarian_gap: Ritualistic, metaphysical, meditative electronic journeys—abstract spiritual content exploring sacred geometry and trance states, almost absent from trending space
